calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-27-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipt For The Blocked Account
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Continued To Apr-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Ford and Elvira Orly for Larry Chew (Administrator).

The Court stated that there was an issue with surcharge and an issue with the Administrator making payment to himself without a court order. Mr. Ford stated that the Administrator was due fees, that the siblings, the Nieces and the Nephews were in agreement and that the work was performed in order to prevent the property from going into foreclosure. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy McDaniels.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petiton To Settle The Accounting, Filing Of Petition To Confirm Sale, And For Receipts Of Distribution.
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment As Attorney For Minor And Approval Of Attorney-Client Fee Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Ford and Elvira Orly for Larry Chew (Administrator). Nicholas Jellins and Bruce Last for Rosalind Chew (Guardian Ad Litem for Chariece Chew).

The Court stated that what is being dealt with is an intestate distribution; the minor will inherit one-fourth of one-fifth of the estate. Therefore, there is no reason to appoint counsel for the minor. In addition, the Court stated that the guardian ad litem had no authority to enter into the compromise. Counsel presented argument to support their positions. The Court denied both petitions, and ordered the personal representative to file a petition to settle the accounting, file a petition to confirm the sale, and file the receipts of distribution. The matter was continued to October 20, 2008 for status on the filings.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.
